title: The Block Side Saga
description: This modpack is aimed at a Star Wars-style playthrough. All mods are selected to make you feel like you are in a galaxy far, far away.
body:
# The Block Dide Saga
### A modpack that will immerse you in the setting of a galaxy far, far away.

**You can play with friends if you have a license (or if you're a pirate, yo-ho-ho).**

**To make it less boring, the modpack includes other mods such as AE2, Tinker's Contract, Iron's Spells and Books, Parcool, and others.**

**There is a quest branch (in development) that will guide you through the entire modpack, keep you entertained, and reward you with nice bonuses.**

**Who will you be? A powerful Jedi or the strongest Sith? The choice is yours.**

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/942a81b705f1b5d926364728b5cbe37283be94c7.png)

In this modpack, we use some copyrighted mods:
[Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)
